reference: I went to urgent care yesterday and was diagnosed with mild right caliectasis. I have had kidney stones before, but the ultrasound showed no signs of urolithiasis. I was prescribed antibiotics because the doctor thought I may have passed a stone. I see my urologist at least twice a year. Should I be concerned?
text: I went to urgent care yesterday and was diagnosed with mild right calicasis. I have had kidney stones before, but the ultrasound showed no signs of urolithiasis. I was prescribed antibiotics because the doctor thought I may have passed a stone. I see my urologist at least twice a year. Should I be concerned?
